description: Style noteFounded by Maurice Rance in 1971, Recherche Nature Cosmetique (rnc) brings you Eau De Plaisir fragrance, which has over 60% natural ingredients in its formulas. The glass flask references the ornaments of the gates of the Louvre, Paris, and is crafted by a renowned glassmaker in Milan the shape of the bottle (designed by Rance) has been retained since the day of its inception.Product DetailsEau de Lavande from Eau De Plaisir is an Eaux De Cologne - the result of mixing high end essential oils with techniques handed down from centuries. Eau Fraiche has a fragrance with overtones of lavender from the Maritime Alps, the freshest and richest in aromatic accords. The top notes are lemon, lime and bitter artemisia that blend into heart notes of lavender, thyme and eucalyptus. The dry down has base notes of patchouli, vetiver and ambergris.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize125 ml
